title: Sushi, the Dog
content:
The dog is doing much better now. The doctor took out the casts but the 4 metal pins stay on a little while  longer. The left leg doesn't come out perfect but I've no problem with that. Will have to wait two more weeks to see how the right leg is doing. But I believe everything is going to be just fine.

!-/gallery/sushi/dog_leg.png!

Oh, I really named the dog **Sushi** [aka ไอ้ชิ!] (thanks to Mahat). The name just hits directly at my taste buds. But thanks to the others' suggestions too. The dog and I really appreciate it. ;)

Have a good day!
